{{Quote|Everything we do is completely legal, and in the best interests of both the Cartel and the communities we serve.|Lori spouting the Metatheran Cartel party line|<ref name="acp">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}}</ref>}}
'''Lori''' was a rather gaunt [[Caarite]] who was [[Velin Wir]]'s secretary. Velin Wir would often disappear without telling her where he was going.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence}} {{1st}}
